item.title: Brain rot doesn’t happen overnight—it grows from what we repeatedly feed our minds. Endless mindless scrolling, constant distractions, negativity, and consuming content without purpose slowly weaken our focus, creativity, and critical thinking. Just as ju
item.description: By @cerysblanche: Brain rot doesn’t happen overnight—it grows from what we repeatedly feed our minds. Endless mindless scrolling, constant distractions, negativity, and consuming content without purpose slowly weaken our focus, creativity, and critical thinking. Just as ju
